props.ChoiceText: In thick smoke and confused noise, you kept loading and firing by memory more than sight.
props.ChoiceBio: Fire under smoke taught you that training is what remains when sight, noise, and intention all fail together.

0.TransitionText: Because fire under smoke taught you to fight by habit when sight failed, the years only deepened your veteran craft.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Veteran, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because fire under smoke taught you to fight by habit when sight failed, powder and drill pulled you toward the musketeer's discipline.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Musketeer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because fire under smoke taught you to fight by habit when sight failed, soldiering for pay again became the simplest future.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Mercenary, but you may remain on your current path instead.
